title: Is Misato straight
wikitext:
[]: Is Misato straight? Post by Lucretius » Thu Oct 07, 2010 8:49 am Discuss.

[]: Yes, even you and I. Post by Killer Bee » Thu Oct 07, 2010 8:57 am Misato is gay for Gendo, because everyone is gay for Gendo.

[]: Post by esselfortium » Thu Oct 07, 2010 9:09 am She's gay for Jesus.

[]: Post by greatmightypoo » Thu Oct 07, 2010 9:12 am Judging from the Hot Spring scene, she might be lesbian for Asuka.

[]: Post by Xard » Thu Oct 07, 2010 9:13 am More like she is into bestiality

[]: Re: Is Misato straight? Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Oct 07, 2010 9:21 am Lucretius wrote: Discuss.

[]: Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Thu Oct 07, 2010 9:24 am Isn't she into her own daddy? Unless her daddy's her mommy, I'd say yes.

[]: Re: Is Misato straight? Post by esselfortium » Thu Oct 07, 2010 10:41 am The Eva Monkey wrote: What is the impetus for this topic?

[]: Post by NemZ » Thu Oct 07, 2010 10:50 am Do we know for sure that she and Ritsuko never experimented back in college? It's entirely possible she's some shade of bi.

[]: Re: Is Misato straight? Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Oct 07, 2010 10:50 am esselfortium wrote: Stuart sardonically suggested it in the "is Kaworu gay" thread. I would link the post but I'm on my phone.

[]: Post by Xard » Thu Oct 07, 2010 10:53 am NemZ wrote: Do we know for sure that she and Ritsuko never experimented back in college? It's entirely possible she's some shade of bi.

[]: Post by NemZ » Thu Oct 07, 2010 11:08 am Hard to argue with that though... that penguin has some mad game, son. If even the shy, chaste girls like Hikari can't keep their hands off him what chance does a self judging daddy issues action girl have?

[]: Post by esselfortium » Thu Oct 07, 2010 11:34 am NemZ wrote: Hard to argue with that though... that penguin has some mad game, son. If even the shy, chaste girls like Hikari can't keep her hands off him what chance does a self judging daddy issues action girl have?

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Oct 07, 2010 11:42 am esselfortium wrote: Could it be time to revive the Pen-Pen's Sexuality thread?

[]: Post by esselfortium » Thu Oct 07, 2010 12:31 pm ._.

[]: Post by LeoXiao » Thu Oct 07, 2010 3:13 pm There's no evidence for Misato being bi. Anything other than "we don't know" is just fanwank.

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Oct 07, 2010 3:19 pm LeoXiao wrote: Anything other than "we don't know" is just fanwank.

[]: Post by ath » Thu Oct 07, 2010 4:04 pm LeoXiao wrote: There's no evidence for Misato being bi. Anything other than "we don't know" is just fanwank.

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Oct 07, 2010 4:06 pm If there's one thing that I have learned vicariously from film, is that unlike dudes, girls can have underwear parties and not be gay.

[]: Post by Sachi » Thu Oct 07, 2010 4:12 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: If there's one thing that I have learned vicariously from film, is that unlike dudes, girls can have underwear parties and not be gay.
